name: Orange Biscuits #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, caster sugar, and orange rind until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually blend in the bird's custard powder and plain flour. Form into 24 small balls and place them well apart on greased baking sheets.
3. Flatten each ball with a fork.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) until golden brown.
5. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
